summary: Keep #71452 as the live canonical issue. Current target checkout still hard-caps message rendering at 25 rows, and the hydrated overlapping PR #79593 is only context here: it is open, useful, and maintainer-editable, but not merge-ready because the latest ClawSweeper review reports conflicts and unresolved rank-up changes. The job does not allow merge, fix, or replacement PR actions, so no closure or fix artifact is planned.

actions.reason: #71452 remains the best canonical issue for the root cause. There is an active overlapping implementation candidate, but it is not clean enough to support fixed-by-candidate closure and this job cannot plan repair or merge actions.
